subsystems.TURBO_SYSTEM: KKK K27 Turbocharger at 2.1 bar. Recirculating anti-lag system (Bang-Bang).
subsystems.DRIVETRAIN: Quattro Permanent All-Wheel Drive. Torsen center differential.
subsystems.AERO_PACKAGE: Pikes Peak configuration. Massive front apron & rear double-wing.
subsystems.HANDLING: Severe understeer characteristic requiring Scandinavian Flick entry.
